html:
The Mini Sign is a craftable Item found in the Decorations Filter and Structures Filter. 1 Board is used to craft 4 Mini Signs, requiring a Science Machine to prototype. By placing an item near a Mini Sign, the player can draw that item on it once by using a Feather Pencil.

Unlike other structures, Mini Signs cannot be destroyed with a Hammer to return their crafting resources, but can be dug up with any kind of Shovel. Digging them up will not remove images that have already been drawn on them.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Distinguished Ash Address Plaque, Walnut Address Plaque, and White Address Plaque skins were introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
Woven - Distinguished
Year of the Carrat Collection
Ash Address Plaque
Add that personalized touch.
See ingame
Woven - Distinguished
Year of the Carrat Collection
Walnut Address Plaque
Add that personalized touch.
See ingame

Add that personalized touch.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Fantasmical Collection
Fantasmical Plaque
Display your flowery prose for all to see.
Woven - Elegant
Nom de Plume Collection
Library Placard
Keep your library orderly and properly labeled.
Woven - Distinguished
Cawnival Collection
Cawnival Plaque
Corvus Goodfeather humbly suggests writing a nice review for the Cawnival.

Tips

  • Mini Signs can be used to sort Chests or other containers in the players' base, as they can be placed very close to them.
  • A frozen Butterfly and Birds can be drawn on the Mini Sign.

Trivia

  • Mini Signs were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Item Skins will show on a Mini Sign.

Assets

Mini SignCawnival Plaque

  • Idle
  • Dropped

  • Dropped

Gallery

  • Mini Sign as seen in the poster for the Herd Mentality update.
  • Mini Signs used to sort several chests.
  • The prompt that appears while drawing a nearby item on a sign.

“I could draw better than that!”
–Wilson
“Haha oh man, who drew THAT?”
–Willow
“Tiny picture is worth many, tinier words.”
–Wolfgang
“Such a striking likeness...”

“An excellent diagram! Very accurate.”
–Wickerbottom
“Is there anything wood can't do?”

“It was drawn in a steady hand.”

“A wonderfully effective way to categorize my things.”
–Wagstaff

–Walani
“Too small for a restaurant sign.”
–Warly
“A wee landmarker.”
–Woodlegs
“HATH THE PRETTY PICTURE”
–Wilba
“Pretty picture”
–Wormwood
“A sign. Always useful for organizing.”
–Wheeler
“Cutesy little drawing.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, draw me next!”
–Wortox
“Oooh, pictures!”
–Wurt
“Who drew this?”
–Walter
“Someone obviously thought it was important enough to put on a sign.”
–Wanda
The Mini Sign is a craftable Item found in the Decorations Filter and Structures Filter. 1 Board is used to craft 4 Mini Signs, requiring a Science Machine to prototype. By placing an item near a Mini Sign, the player can draw that item on it once by using a Feather Pencil.
Unlike other structures, Mini Signs cannot be destroyed with a Hammer to return their crafting resources, but can be dug up with any kind of Shovel. Digging them up will not remove images that have already been drawn on them.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Biển hiệu Mini là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Trang trí và Bộ lọc Cấu trúc. 1 Bảng được sử dụng để chế tạo 4 Biển hiệu Nhỏ, yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bằng cách đặt một vật phẩm gần Biển hiệu Mini, người chơi có thể vẽ vật phẩm đó lên đó một lần bằng cách sử dụng Bút lông vũ.

Always useful for organizing. |winona = Cutesy little drawing. |wortox = Hyuyu, draw me next! |wurt = Oooh, pictures! |walter = Who drew this? |wanda = Someone obviously thought it was important enough to put on a sign. |choose = wx78}} The '''Mini Sign''' is a craftable [[Item]] found in the [[Decorations Filter]] and [[Structures Filter]]. 1 [[Boards|Board]] is used to craft 4 Mini Signs, requiring a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. By placing an item near a Mini Sign, the player can draw that item on it once by using a [[Feather Pencil]]. Unlike other structures, Mini Signs cannot be destroyed with a [[Hammer]] to return their crafting resources, but can be dug up with any kind of [[Shovel]]. Digging them up will not remove images that have already been drawn on them. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Mini_Sign-0|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Distinguished Ash Address Plaque''', '''Walnut Address Plaque''', and '''White Address Plaque''' skins were introduced during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Mini Signs can be used to sort [[Chest]]s or other containers in the players' base, as they can be placed very close to them. * A frozen [[Butterfly]] and [[Birds]] can be drawn on the Mini Sign. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * Mini Signs were introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in the ''[[A New Reign#November 24, 2016 - Herd Mentality|Herd Mentality]]'' update during ''[[A New Reign]]''. They were later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update. * Item [[Belongings|Skins]] will show on a Mini Sign. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Mini Sign= Mini Sign Build.png|Idle Mini Sign Dropped.png|Dropped |-|Cawnival Plaque= Cawnival Plaque Build.png|Idle Cawnival Plaque Dropped.png|Dropped == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == DST Update Herd Mentality.png|Mini Sign as seen in the poster for the ''[[A New Reign#November 24, 2016 - Herd Mentality|Herd Mentality]]'' update.
